headline: I Got Hurt in a Forklift Tip-Over—Now What?
articleBody: Forklift accidents happen fast and can cause serious, life-changing injuries. Whether it was a tip-over or a mechanical failure, the first step is always getting medical help and reporting the incident. Don't worry about being blamed; workers' comp is generally "no-fault" in Utah and Idaho. Just focus on recovery while a pro looks into the safety specs. Reach us at 801-746-0290 for guidance.
